interface.name: PS_F_EvaluateVisitRequest

a:ruleInputTestConfigs.a:value: #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:2e4db39a-2f38-4769-b11e-8ad8441f993a"(#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:2e4db39a-2f38-4769-b11e-8ad8441f993a/1248a4bf-108e-4870-8db8-2816b7cd4bea": today(), #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:2e4db39a-2f38-4769-b11e-8ad8441f993a/bd55e7e8-03c6-4f77-988b-8b8f254043d2": false, #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:2e4db39a-2f38-4769-b11e-8ad8441f993a/3ae6d220-0450-4065-b61f-4b136d605959": fn!touser("stefan.helzle@bechtle.com"), #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:2e4db39a-2f38-4769-b11e-8ad8441f993a/f51c6f76-9293-444e-91b7-3287f0bd53b9": fn!datetime(2025, 2, 27, 13, 20, 38, 450), #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:2e4db39a-2f38-4769-b11e-8ad8441f993a/3bc83589-99d7-4e39-9aab-a543720daca7": "Oma;Ehefrau;Bruder", #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:2e4db39a-2f38-4769-b11e-8ad8441f993a/71d51822-db2b-4543-b00e-364428dbdfbc": "eu minim ex proident laboris consequat laborum incididunt anim occaecat aute consequat magna sit proident")
